name: Jump
description: You touch a creature. The creature's jump distance is tripled until the spell ends.
effect: The touched creature's jump distance is tripled for 1 minute. Allows traversal of gaps, obstacles, and terrain features that would normally block movement.
notes: Simplest touch buff — trivial transmutation with narrow use case
Engine gap: jump-distance modifier has no current movement system mechanic [~]
Modeled as utility effect prose; engine support needed for traversal bonus
